---
title: "GG_JvNJ"
author: "D. Grespin"
date: "2026-01-14"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

## Load Libraries

```{r load-libraries}

library(R.matlab)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggbreak)
library(dplyr)
library(effectsize)
library(tidyr)

```

## Load and arrange Matlab data

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r load-variables}

# read MATLAB .mat file into R (make sure to copy full path or place in your working directory)
intStruct1 <- readMat('/Users/drew.grespin/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofDenver/cav1_project/dataMats/confluentLine_dataMats/Paper/junctionline10um_confluent_Mar25.mat')
intStruct2 <- readMat('/Users/drew.grespin/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofDenver/cav1_project/dataMats/confluentLine_dataMats/Paper/junctionline15um_confluent_Mar25.mat')
intStruct3 <- readMat('/Users/drew.grespin/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofDenver/cav1_project/dataMats/confluentLine_dataMats/Paper/junctionline20um_confluent_Mar25.mat')

# =========================
# EXTRACT DATA FROM STRUCTS
# =========================

# NonA (J vs NJ)
J1  <- intStruct1$lineOut[[9]]
J2  <- intStruct2$lineOut[[9]]
J3  <- intStruct3$lineOut[[9]]

NJ1 <- intStruct1$lineOut[[12]]
NJ2 <- intStruct2$lineOut[[12]]
NJ3 <- intStruct3$lineOut[[12]]

# A versions
J1A  <- intStruct1$lineOut[[10]]
J2A  <- intStruct2$lineOut[[10]]
J3A  <- intStruct3$lineOut[[10]]

NJ1A <- intStruct1$lineOut[[13]]
NJ2A <- intStruct2$lineOut[[13]]
NJ3A <- intStruct3$lineOut[[13]]

#Cav1
J1  <- data.frame(Normalized_Intensity = J1)
J2  <- data.frame(Normalized_Intensity = J2)
J3  <- data.frame(Normalized_Intensity = J3)

NJ1 <- data.frame(Normalized_Intensity = NJ1)
NJ2 <- data.frame(Normalized_Intensity = NJ2)
NJ3 <- data.frame(Normalized_Intensity = NJ3)

# A versions
J1A  <- data.frame(Normalized_Intensity = J1A)
J2A  <- data.frame(Normalized_Intensity = J2A)
J3A  <- data.frame(Normalized_Intensity = J3A)

NJ1A <- data.frame(Normalized_Intensity = NJ1A)
NJ2A <- data.frame(Normalized_Intensity = NJ2A)
NJ3A <- data.frame(Normalized_Intensity = NJ3A)

```

## Isolate desired data segments for analysis

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r isolate-segments}

nrow(J1)
nrow(J2)
nrow(J3)
nrow(NJ1)
nrow(NJ2)
nrow(NJ3)
nrow(J1A)
nrow(J2A)
nrow(J3A)
nrow(NJ1A)
nrow(NJ2A)
nrow(NJ3A)

```

## Set up data frame for plotting

```{r df-setup}

dfPlot <- data.frame(
                     Intensity = c(
                       J1$Normalized_Intensity,
                       J2$Normalized_Intensity,
                       J3$Normalized_Intensity,
                       NJ1$Normalized_Intensity,
                       NJ2$Normalized_Intensity,
                       NJ3$Normalized_Intensity,
                       J1A$Normalized_Intensity,
                       J2A$Normalized_Intensity,
                       J3A$Normalized_Intensity,
                       NJ1A$Normalized_Intensity,
                       NJ2A$Normalized_Intensity,
                       NJ3A$Normalized_Intensity
                     ),
                     Protein = factor(c(
                       rep("Cav1", length(J1$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("Cav1", length(J2$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("Cav1", length(J3$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("Cav1", length(NJ1$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("Cav1", length(NJ2$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("Cav1", length(NJ3$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("Actin", length(J1A$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("Actin", length(J2A$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("Actin", length(J3A$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("Actin", length(NJ1A$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("Actin", length(NJ2A$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("Actin", length(NJ3A$Normalized_Intensity))
                     ), levels = c("Cav1", "Actin")),
                     
                     Size = factor(c(
                       rep("10", length(J1$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("15", length(J2$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("20", length(J3$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("10", length(NJ1$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("15", length(NJ2$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("20", length(NJ3$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("10", length(J1A$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("15", length(J2A$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("20", length(J3A$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("10", length(NJ1A$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("15", length(NJ2A$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("20", length(NJ3A$Normalized_Intensity))
                     ), levels = c("10", "15", "20")),
                     
                      Junction = factor(c(
                       rep("J", length(J1$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("J", length(J2$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("J", length(J3$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("NJ", length(NJ1$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("NJ", length(NJ2$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("NJ", length(NJ3$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("J", length(J1A$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("J", length(J2A$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("J", length(J3A$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("NJ", length(NJ1A$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("NJ", length(NJ2A$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("NJ", length(NJ3A$Normalized_Intensity))
                     ), levels = c("J", "NJ"))
                    )

xpos_map <- c(
  "10_J"  = 1.0,
  "10_NJ" = 1.4,
  "15_J"  = 1.9,
  "15_NJ" = 2.3,
  "20_J"  = 2.8,
  "20_NJ" = 3.2
)

dfPlot <- dfPlot %>%
  mutate(x_pos = paste0(Size, "_", Junction)) %>%
  mutate(x_pos = xpos_map[x_pos])

```

## Compute stats for custom box & whiskers (IQR)

```{r iqr-compute}

library(dplyr)

# Cav1
box_stats <- dfPlot %>%
  filter(Protein == "Cav1") %>%
  group_by(Junction, Size, x_pos) %>%   # group by Size and Junction if you want separate boxes per Junction
  summarise(
    lower   = quantile(Intensity, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    median  = quantile(Intensity, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE),
    upper   = quantile(Intensity, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Actin
box_statsA <- dfPlot %>%
  filter(Protein == "Actin") %>%
  group_by(Junction, Size, x_pos) %>%
  summarise(
    lower   = quantile(Intensity, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    median  = quantile(Intensity, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE),
    upper   = quantile(Intensity, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

```

```

## Compute stats for confidence interval & Cohen's d

```{r stat-compute}

# ---------------------------
# Cav1: J vs NJ
# ---------------------------

J_int10  <- dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="10" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"]
NJ_int10 <- dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="10" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"]

J_int15  <- dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="15" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"]
NJ_int15 <- dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="15" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"]

J_int20  <- dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="20" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"]
NJ_int20 <- dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="20" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"]

# ---------------------------
# Actin: J vs NJ
# ---------------------------

J_int10A  <- dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Actin" & dfPlot$Size=="10" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"]
NJ_int10A <- dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Actin" & dfPlot$Size=="10" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"]

J_int15A  <- dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Actin" & dfPlot$Size=="15" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"]
NJ_int15A <- dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Actin" & dfPlot$Size=="15" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"]

J_int20A  <- dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Actin" & dfPlot$Size=="20" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"]
NJ_int20A <- dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Actin" & dfPlot$Size=="20" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"]

# ---------------------------
# Compute Cohen's d
# ---------------------------

cohens_d(J_int10, NJ_int10)
cohens_d(J_int15, NJ_int15)
cohens_d(J_int20, NJ_int20)

cohens_d(J_int10A, NJ_int10A)
cohens_d(J_int15A, NJ_int15A)
cohens_d(J_int20A, NJ_int20A)

# ---------------------------
# Means and differences
# ---------------------------

mean(J_int10); mean(NJ_int10); mean(J_int10) - mean(NJ_int10)
mean(J_int15); mean(NJ_int15); mean(J_int15) - mean(NJ_int15)
mean(J_int20); mean(NJ_int20); mean(J_int20) - mean(NJ_int20)

mean(J_int10A); mean(NJ_int10A); mean(J_int10A) - mean(NJ_int10A)
mean(J_int15A); mean(NJ_int15A); mean(J_int15A) - mean(NJ_int15A)
mean(J_int20A); mean(NJ_int20A); mean(J_int20A) - mean(NJ_int20A)

# ---------------------------
# 95% confidence intervals
# ---------------------------

t.test(J_int10, NJ_int10)$conf.int
t.test(J_int15, NJ_int15)$conf.int
t.test(J_int20, NJ_int20)$conf.int

t.test(J_int10A, NJ_int10A)$conf.int
t.test(J_int15A, NJ_int15A)$conf.int
t.test(J_int20A, NJ_int20A)$conf.int

```

## Sample (for large datasets) and compute statistical significance between groups

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r signif-test-cav1}

# J comparison 10 to 15 um
pval_J_10to15 <- t.test(
                         dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="10" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"],
                         dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="15" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"]
                        )$p.value

# NJ comparison 10 to 15 um
pval_NJ_10to15 <- t.test(
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="10" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"],
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="15" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"]
                         )$p.value

# J comparison 10 to 20 um
pval_J_10to20 <- t.test(
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="10" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"],
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="20" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"]
                         )$p.value

# NJ comparison 10 to 20 um
pval_NJ_10to20 <- t.test(
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="10" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"],
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="20" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"]
                          )$p.value

# J comparison 15 to 20 um
pval_J_15to20 <- t.test(
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="15" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"],
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="20" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"]
                         )$p.value
 
# NJ comparison 15 to 20 um
pval_NJ_15to20 <- t.test(
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="15" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"],
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="20" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"]
                          )$p.value

# 4 hours front to rear comparison
pval_10 <- t.test(
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="10" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"],
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="10" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"]
                )$p.value

# 8 hours front to rear comparison
pval_15 <- t.test(
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="15" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"],
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="15" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"]
                )$p.value

# 24 hours front to rear comparison
pval_20 <- t.test(
                  dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="20" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"],
                  dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="20" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"]
                 )$p.value

## =========================
## Significance bars (ALL)
## =========================

# Helper: p-value -> significance label
p_to_label <- function(p) {
  ifelse(p < 0.001, "***",
         ifelse(p < 0.01, "**",
                ifelse(p < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
}

# Build table of ALL comparisons you ran
sig_tests <- data.frame(
  x_start = c(
    xpos_map["10_J"],  xpos_map["10_NJ"],   # 4 -> 8
    xpos_map["10_J"],  xpos_map["10_NJ"],   # 4 -> 24
    xpos_map["15_J"],  xpos_map["15_NJ"],   # 8 -> 24
    xpos_map["10_J"],  xpos_map["15_J"],    # Rear vs Front
    xpos_map["20_J"]
  ),
  x_end = c(
    xpos_map["15_J"],  xpos_map["15_NJ"],
    xpos_map["20_J"], xpos_map["20_NJ"],
    xpos_map["20_J"], xpos_map["20_NJ"],
    xpos_map["10_NJ"], xpos_map["15_NJ"],
    xpos_map["20_NJ"]
  ),
  pval = c(
    pval_J_10to15,  pval_NJ_10to15,
    pval_J_10to20, pval_NJ_10to20,
    pval_J_15to20, pval_NJ_15to20,
    pval_10, pval_15, pval_20
  )
)

y_start      <- 1.25
y_step       <- 0.19
y_within_grp <- 1.06   # fixed y for Rear vs Front comparisons

sig_lines <- sig_tests %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    # identify Rear vs Front within the same protein
    within_group =
      (x_start == xpos_map["10_J"]  & x_end == xpos_map["10_NJ"])  |
      (x_start == xpos_map["15_J"]  & x_end == xpos_map["15_NJ"])  |
      (x_start == xpos_map["20_J"] & x_end == xpos_map["20_NJ"])
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    # assign y positions
    y = ifelse(
      within_group,
      y_within_grp,
      y_start + y_step * (dplyr::row_number() - 1 - cumsum(within_group))
    ),
    label = p_to_label(pval)
  )

```

## Sample (for large datasets) and compute statistical significance between groups

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r signif-test-actin}

# J comparison 10 to 15 um
pval_J_10to15A <- t.test(
                         dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="10" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"],
                         dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="15" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"]
                        )$p.value

# NJ comparison 10 to 15 um
pval_NJ_10to15A <- t.test(
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="10" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"],
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="15" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"]
                         )$p.value

# J comparison 10 to 20 um
pval_J_10to20A <- t.test(
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="10" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"],
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="20" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"]
                         )$p.value

# NJ comparison 10 to 20 um
pval_NJ_10to20A <- t.test(
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="10" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"],
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="20" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"]
                          )$p.value

# J comparison 15 to 20 um
pval_J_15to20A <- t.test(
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="15" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"],
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="20" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"]
                         )$p.value
 
# NJ comparison 15 to 20 um
pval_NJ_15to20A <- t.test(
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="15" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"],
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="20" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"]
                          )$p.value

# 4 hours front to rear comparison
pval_10A <- t.test(
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="10" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"],
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="10" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"]
                )$p.value

# 8 hours front to rear comparison
pval_15A <- t.test(
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="15" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"],
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="15" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"]
                )$p.value

# 24 hours front to rear comparison
pval_20A <- t.test(
                  dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="20" & dfPlot$Junction=="J"],
                  dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein=="Cav1" & dfPlot$Size=="20" & dfPlot$Junction=="NJ"]
                 )$p.value

## =========================
## Significance bars (ALL)
## =========================

# Helper: p-value -> significance label
p_to_label <- function(p) {
  ifelse(p < 0.001, "***",
         ifelse(p < 0.01, "**",
                ifelse(p < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
}

# Build table of ALL comparisons you ran
sig_testsA <- data.frame(
  x_start = c(
    xpos_map["10_J"],  xpos_map["10_NJ"],   # 4 -> 8
    xpos_map["10_J"],  xpos_map["10_NJ"],   # 4 -> 24
    xpos_map["15_J"],  xpos_map["15_NJ"],   # 8 -> 24
    xpos_map["10_J"],  xpos_map["15_J"],    # Rear vs Front
    xpos_map["20_J"]
  ),
  x_end = c(
    xpos_map["15_J"],  xpos_map["15_NJ"],
    xpos_map["20_J"], xpos_map["20_NJ"],
    xpos_map["20_J"], xpos_map["20_NJ"],
    xpos_map["10_NJ"], xpos_map["15_NJ"],
    xpos_map["20_NJ"]
  ),
  pval = c(
    pval_J_10to15A,  pval_NJ_10to15A,
    pval_J_10to20A, pval_NJ_10to20A,
    pval_J_15to20A, pval_NJ_15to20A,
    pval_10A, pval_15A, pval_20A
  )
)

y_start      <- 1.25
y_step       <- 0.19
y_within_grp <- 1.06   # fixed y for Rear vs Front comparisons

sig_linesA <- sig_testsA %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    # identify Rear vs Front within the same protein
    within_group =
      (x_start == xpos_map["10_J"]  & x_end == xpos_map["10_NJ"])  |
      (x_start == xpos_map["15_J"]  & x_end == xpos_map["15_NJ"])  |
      (x_start == xpos_map["20_J"] & x_end == xpos_map["20_NJ"])
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    # assign y positions
    y = ifelse(
      within_group,
      y_within_grp,
      y_start + y_step * (dplyr::row_number() - 1 - cumsum(within_group))
    ),
    label = p_to_label(pval)
  )

```

## Preset theme elements

```{r theme-setup}

# Define colors
region_colors <- c("J" = "red", "NJ" = "green")

# Define line parameters
median_length   <- 0.3
quartile_length <- 0.2

median_size   <- 4
quartile_size <- 3

# Define theme
plot_theme <- theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title         = element_text(size = 20, face = 'bold', hjust = 0.5, family = 'Arial'),
    axis.title         = element_text(size = 16, face = 'bold', hjust = 0.5, family = 'Arial'),
    axis.text.y        = element_text(size = 72, hjust = 0.5, family = 'Arial', face = 'bold'),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(linewidth = 4, color = 'gray40'),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    legend.position    = "none"
  )

```

## Setup plot features

```{r plot-setup-cav1}

boxplot <- ggplot(dfPlot %>% filter(Protein == "Cav1"), aes(x = x_pos, y = Intensity)) +
           # Raw points
           geom_jitter(
                       width = 0.14,
                       alpha = 0.05,
                       size  = 0.5,
                       color = "black"
           ) +
           # Vertical IQR line
           geom_segment(
                        data = box_stats,
                        aes(x = x_pos, xend = x_pos, y = lower, yend = upper, color = Junction),
                        size = quartile_size
                       ) +
           # Q1 and Q3 horizontal lines
           geom_segment(
                        data = box_stats,
                        aes(
                            x     = x_pos - quartile_length / 2,
                            xend  = x_pos + quartile_length / 2,
                            y     = lower,
                            yend  = lower,
                            color = Junction
                           ),
                           size = quartile_size
                       ) +
           geom_segment(
                        data = box_stats,
                        aes(
                            x     = x_pos - quartile_length / 2,
                            xend  = x_pos + quartile_length / 2,
                            y     = upper,
                            yend  = upper,
                            color = Junction
                           ),
                           size = quartile_size
                       ) +
           # Median line
           geom_segment(
                        data = box_stats,
                        aes(
                            x     = x_pos - median_length / 2,
                            xend  = x_pos + median_length / 2,
                            y     = median,
                            yend  = median,
                            color = Junction
                           ),
                        size = median_size
                       ) +
           #X/Y scales
           scale_x_continuous(
                              breaks = c(1.0, 1.4, 2.2, 2.6, 3.4, 3.8),
                              labels = c("", "", "", "", "", ""),
                              expand = c(0, 0)
                             ) +
           scale_y_continuous(
                              limits = c(-.1, 2.45),
                              breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.25),
                              expand = c(0, 0)
                             ) +
           # Color of IQR lines
           scale_color_manual(
                              values = c(region_colors)  # combined for points and segments
                             ) +
           # Remove axis labels
           labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
           # add plot set up elements
           plot_theme

```

## Add significance to plot

```{r signif-plot-cav1}

boxplot <- boxplot +
           geom_segment(
                        data = sig_lines,
                        aes(x = x_start,
                            xend = x_end,
                            y = y,
                            yend = y),
                        color = "black",
                        size = 6
                       ) +
           geom_text(
                       data = sig_lines,
                              aes(
                                  x = (x_start + x_end) / 2,
                                  y = y + ifelse(label == "ns", 0.17, 0.01),
                                  label = label
                                 ),
                              size = 50
                    )

```

## Plot Output

```{r print-plot-cav1, fig.width = 22, fig.height = 11}

boxplot

```

## Setup plot features

```{r plot-setup-actin}

boxplot <- ggplot(dfPlot %>% filter(Protein == "Actin"), aes(x = x_pos, y = Intensity)) +
           # Raw points
           geom_jitter(
                       width = 0.14,
                       alpha = 0.05,
                       size  = 0.5,
                       color = "black"
           ) +
           # Vertical IQR line
           geom_segment(
                        data = box_statsA,
                        aes(x = x_pos, xend = x_pos, y = lower, yend = upper, color = Junction),
                        size = quartile_size
                       ) +
           # Q1 and Q3 horizontal lines
           geom_segment(
                        data = box_statsA,
                        aes(
                            x     = x_pos - quartile_length / 2,
                            xend  = x_pos + quartile_length / 2,
                            y     = lower,
                            yend  = lower,
                            color = Junction
                           ),
                           size = quartile_size
                       ) +
           geom_segment(
                        data = box_statsA,
                        aes(
                            x     = x_pos - quartile_length / 2,
                            xend  = x_pos + quartile_length / 2,
                            y     = upper,
                            yend  = upper,
                            color = Junction
                           ),
                           size = quartile_size
                       ) +
           # Median line
           geom_segment(
                        data = box_statsA,
                        aes(
                            x     = x_pos - median_length / 2,
                            xend  = x_pos + median_length / 2,
                            y     = median,
                            yend  = median,
                            color = Junction
                           ),
                        size = median_size
                       ) +
           #X/Y scales
           scale_x_continuous(
                              breaks = c(1.0, 1.4, 2.2, 2.6, 3.4, 3.8),
                              labels = c("", "", "", "", "", ""),
                              expand = c(0, 0)
                             ) +
           scale_y_continuous(
                              limits = c(-.1, 2.45),
                              breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.25),
                              expand = c(0, 0)
                             ) +
           # Color of IQR lines
           scale_color_manual(
                              values = c(region_colors)  # combined for points and segments
                             ) +
           # Remove axis labels
           labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
           # add plot set up elements
           plot_theme

```

## Add significance to plot

```{r signif-plot-actin}

boxplot <- boxplot +
           geom_segment(
                        data = sig_linesA,
                        aes(x = x_start,
                            xend = x_end,
                            y = y,
                            yend = y),
                        color = "black",
                        size = 6
                       ) +
           geom_text(
                       data = sig_lines,
                              aes(
                                  x = (x_start + x_end) / 2,
                                  y = y + ifelse(label == "ns", 0.17, 0.01),
                                  label = label
                                 ),
                              size = 50
                    )

```

## Plot Output

```{r print-plot-actin, fig.width = 22, fig.height = 11}

boxplot

```

```{r big-ratio-finder}

```{r big-ratio-finder-reno}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

# =========================
# BUILD BIG RATIO DATASET
# =========================

# =========================
# BUILD BIG RATIO DATASET
# =========================

ratio_df_big <- dfPlot %>%
  # compute mean per Protein, Size, and Junction
  group_by(Protein, Size, Junction) %>%
  summarise(mean_int = mean(Intensity, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  # pivot so J (Rear) and NJ (Front) are columns
  pivot_wider(names_from = Junction, values_from = mean_int) %>%
  # compute ratio Rear / Front
  mutate(ratio = J / NJ) %>%
  # create x-axis factor in exact order you want
  mutate(x_axis = factor(
    paste0(Protein, "_", Size),
    levels = c("Cav1_10","Cav1_15","Cav1_20","Actin_10","Actin_15","Actin_20")
  ))

# =========================
# BIG RATIO PLOT
# =========================

ratio_plot <- ggplot(ratio_df_big, aes(x = x_axis, y = ratio)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.5, fill = "grey40") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 32) +
  labs(x = "", y = "") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 3.1), breaks = seq(0,3,0.5), expand = c(0, 0))
  
```

```{r big-ratio-plot, fig.width=5, fig.height=3}
ratio_plot

```
